violations.text: The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by small accumulation of new droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The plastic containers were observed with chips and cracks. Ice scoop was observed chipped and crack. Food contact surfaces Free of breaks, open seams, cracks, chips, inclusions, pits, and similar imperfections; Free of sharp internal angles, corners, and crevices. Containers and ice scoop to be replaced Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The floors behind the stove have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (dishes) were observed with rodent droppings. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Dishes were brought over to 3-bay sink to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by new rodent droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

The plastic containers were observed with chips and cracks. Food contact surfaces Free of breaks, open seams, cracks, chips, inclusions, pits, and similar imperfections; Free of sharp internal angles, corners, and crevices. Containers and ice scoop to be replaced Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

The floors in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris and grease. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (prep tables, ladles, bowls) were observed with an accumulation of rodent droppings. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. All equipment was taken to 3-bay sink to be sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by new rodent droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025
Boxes of food (lemons) were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025

The plastic containers were observed with chips and cracks. Ice scoop was observed chipped and crack. Food contact surfaces Free of breaks, open seams, cracks, chips, inclusions, pits, and similar imperfections; Free of sharp internal angles, corners, and crevices. Containers and ice scoop to be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of various shelving have an accumulation of debris and rodent droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025

The floors in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris and grease. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025

The plastic containers were observed with chips and cracks. Food contact surfaces Free of breaks, open seams, cracks, chips, inclusions, pits, and similar imperfections; Free of sharp internal angles, corners, and crevices. Containers to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the basement have an accumulation of rodent droppings. Establishment to clean and monitor area. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
The floor in the basement area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
Allergy statement is lacking on the menus. Per PIC, allergy statement will be added. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by small accumulation of new droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment to continue with daily cleaning of all surfaces and to increase pest control service to 2x monthly. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2025

The plastic containers were observed with chips and cracks. Food contact surfaces Free of breaks, open seams, cracks, chips, inclusions, pits, and similar imperfections; Free of sharp internal angles, corners, and crevices. Containers to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2025

The floor in various locations the facility has a small accumulation of rodent droppings (Behind fryolator, in basement, in side room, etc.). The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2025
Allergy statement is lacking on the menus. Per PIC, allergy statement will be added. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (prep unit, prep table, food containers, plates, food covers, etc.) were observed with an accumulation of rodent droppings. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC started cleaning and sanitizing all surfaces. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in various locations of establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025

The plastic containers were observed with chips and cracks. Food contact surfaces Free of breaks, open seams, cracks, chips, inclusions, pits, and similar imperfections; Free of sharp internal angles, corners, and crevices. Containers to be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the equipment/shelving have an accumulation of rodent droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025
The floor throughout the facility accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025
Allergy statement was lacking on the menu's. PIC stated daughter will help create allergy statement. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The plastic containers were observed with chips and cracks. Food contact surfaces Free of breaks, open seams, cracks, chips, inclusions, pits, and similar imperfections; Free of sharp internal angles, corners, and crevices. Containers to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the bleach solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit have an accumulation of food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The floors in the basement, upstairs, next to cook station, and side storage room was observed with accumulation of droppings. Entire establishment to be thoroughly cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement/upstairs area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. PIC is in process of decluttering establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
Allergy statement was lacking on the menu's. PIC stated daughter will help create allergy statement. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by boxes. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. PIC relocated boxes. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. PIC to use 3-bay sink to sanitized all dishes/ equipment. Inspector demonstrated how to set up 3-bay with bleach. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ( slicer) by the blade sharpener were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer to be taken apart washed, rinsed, AND SANITIZED before use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of bio-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

Food in the walk-in were observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All food was relocated to different units. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

A brick of open rodenticide was observed stored on the stairs heading upstairs. PIC disposed of brick. Poison shall be used by professional pest control company only. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

Meat was observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Meat was relocated to running water. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Door sweep to be added. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by large accumulation of droppings and dead rodents throughout the facility. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
7 Dead rodents were observed on a glue board/floor in the basement. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
Lemons and onions were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The plastic containers were observed with chips and cracks. Food contact surfaces Free of breaks, open seams, cracks, chips, inclusions, pits, and similar imperfections; Free of sharp internal angles, corners, and crevices. Containers to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New cutting boards to be ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The walk-in refrigerator was not in good repair. Unit was observed at 43 degrees and unable to keep food at 41 or below. Walk-in to be used for shelf stable foods only until repaired or adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the bleach solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit and reach-in freezer have an accumulation of food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
The hand sink does not have adequate hot water pressure. Hand sink to be repaired or adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
The floors in the basement, upstairs, and side storage room was observed with a large accumulation of droppings. Entire establishment to be thoroughly cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement/upstairs area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
